title: sphaerostephanos elmerorum
intro: Sphaerostephanos elmerorum is a species of fern, belonging to the family Dryniaceae, native to the Philippines. It has been studied for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as wound healing and anti-oxidative properties. Sphaerostephanos elmerorum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, to treat various ailments.
